idea-plugin.name: Monogate Forge
idea-plugin.description:
EML-lang support for IntelliJ-platform IDEs.

Surface today:
  • Syntax highlighting for .eml files
  • Compile-to-target action (Tools menu) shelling out to the eml-compile Python CLI
  • Inspection that flags chain-order violations on save by running eml-compile --profile-only and surfacing parser errors
Inline profile annotations (chain order / cost class on each function header) are planned for a future release once the IntelliJ Platform's CodeVision API matures across all targets.

action.description: Compile the active .eml file to a Forge target (c / rust / python / llvm / wasm / verilog / vhdl / chisel / lean)
